codeReview.summary: The dynamics-core feature is comprehensively implemented. All 4 core dynamics (StructuralTension, StructuralConflict, Oscillation, Resolution) are present with proper threshold parameter injection (zero hardcoded constants). The 1670-line module includes 36 tests covering all expected behaviors from the feature specification. All 178 tests pass, clippy reports no warnings, and fmt is clean. The implementation correctly handles edge cases (empty/single mutation history) and demonstrates cross-dynamic coherence (oscillation/resolution mutual exclusivity).

issues.description: Oscillation detection uses a simplified heuristic (comparing string lengths via new_val.len() > old_val.len()) to determine advance/regress direction. While functional for the test cases and documented in the code, this heuristic may not accurately capture semantic progress/regress in real-world scenarios where actual content changes don't correlate with string length. Future enhancement could use semantic gap measurement (compute_gap_magnitude) for more accurate direction detection.

summary: PASS - The dynamics-core feature is fully implemented and tested. All 4 core dynamics work correctly with configurable thresholds. 36 new tests cover structural tension quantification, conflict detection with threshold sensitivity, oscillation detection with direction changes, resolution detection with velocity/reversal thresholds, edge cases, and cross-dynamic coherence. All validators pass (178 tests, clippy clean, fmt clean). One minor non-blocking issue noted regarding the simplified direction detection heuristic in oscillation detection.
